questions.option_a: I appreciate you being so thorough and taking care to do a good job. I know you're trying to help keep my teeth healthy, and a little discomfort is worth it.
questions.option_b: I understand you need to be thorough to do the job properly. I'm just glad to get my regular cleaning done.

questions.scenario: Your friend is anxious about their first job interview in several years after being a stay-at-home parent.
questions.option_a: I'm so proud of you for taking this step! You've developed incredible skills managing a household and raising children - any employer would be lucky to have someone with your dedication and problem-solving abilities.
questions.option_b: I'm sure your skills will come back to you once you get back into the work routine. Most employers understand when people take time off for family.

questions.scenario: A bank teller is taking longer than usual to process your transaction because their computer system is running slowly.
questions.option_a: I can see you're doing everything you can to help me despite the technical issues. I appreciate your patience and thoroughness - there's no rush on my end.
questions.option_b: I can see the system is giving you trouble today. Hopefully the IT department can get these issues resolved soon.
